expect: Trace 3 proxy-metric chains (proxy-K -> knowledge density, UCB1 -> domain value, Sharpe -> lesson quality). Prediction: >=2 of 3 chains show divergence. Falsified if: <2 chains diverge.
actual: CONFIRMED: 3/3 chains diverge (1 UNFALSIFIABLE, 1 WEAK, 1 STRONG). Chain 1 (proxy-K): UNFALSIFIABLE — target (Kolmogorov complexity) uncomputable; sub-chain shows +36,139 token growth over 535 sessions despite 14 compaction events that reversed only 27.1% of growth. Chain 2 (UCB1): WEAK_DIVERGENCE — rho(UCB1, benefit_ratio)=0.60 (moderate correlation); soul correction rho improvement only +0.50; mean rank gap=5.3 positions. Chain 3 (Sharpe): STRONG_DIVERGENCE — 78% lessons self-rate >=8/12; CV=0.168 (compressed, non-discriminating); P-248 citation attractor claim FALSIFIED (rho=0.154, threshold=0.3).
diff: Prediction met: 3/3 chains diverge (expected >=2). Chain 1 is deeper than statistical divergence — the proxy-target relationship is structurally unclosable (Kolmogorov incomputability). Chain 2: UCB1 captures ~36% of benefit variance (rho^2=0.36), so it is informative but substantially noisy. Soul correction cannot fix the volume bias (additive on multiplicative). Chain 3: P-248 claims +1 Sharpe = 1.29x citation — this is directly testable and FALSIFIED at N=801 (rho=0.154 vs claimed positive correlation). 78% self-rating >=8 with CV=0.168 confirms score compression; no standardized rubric exists. 4 structural feedback loops create compound cascade consistent with P-333 (R2=0.91).

chain_1_proxy_k.proxy_metric: token count of bootstrap tier files (T0-T4), 13 fixed files
chain_1_proxy_k.target_claimed: shortest program reproducing swarm = Kolmogorov complexity (PHIL-8 MDL)
chain_1_proxy_k.target_measurability: UNAVAILABLE — Kolmogorov complexity is formally uncomputable

findings.note: proxy-K has grown monotonically. Compaction events reduce ~27% of each growth increment but do not reverse the trend.

chain_1_proxy_k.goodhart_mechanism: proxy-K claims to track MDL/Kolmogorov complexity but measures token count of a fixed 13-file list. These are categorically different: MDL measures algorithmic description length (uncomputable), proxy-K measures verbosity of selected files (trivially computable). Net result: +36,139 tokens over 535 sessions despite 14 compaction events. Compaction events reduce tokens in the monitored files, but knowledge accumulates in unmonitored files (lesson files, domain files). The proxy cannot distinguish compression from selective omission.
chain_1_proxy_k.downstream_amplification: orient.py triggers compaction DUE alerts at >6% proxy-K drift. Sessions respond to alerts by compacting monitored files, which reduces proxy-K without necessarily reducing actual knowledge density. The cascade: MDL_claim -> proxy-K metric -> orient alert -> compaction session -> proxy-K drop -> MDL_claim satisfied. True information density is never measured.
chain_1_proxy_k.falsifiability_note: UNFALSIFIABLE at top level (Kolmogorov complexity uncomputable). Sub-chain (proxy-K -> compaction effectiveness) is measurable and shows net growth, suggesting the proxy tracks accumulation, not compression. True MDL test would require lossless compression ratio of full swarm state.

chain_2_ucb1.chain: UCB1 dispatch score -> actual domain value
chain_2_ucb1.proxy_metric: UCB1 = merge_rate * log1p(lessons) * sharpe_factor + explore_term + modifiers

findings.note: Soul correction (pre_soul rho=0.10 -> post_soul rho=0.60) provides significant improvement but is still insufficient — 40% of benefit variance is unexplained.

chain_2_ucb1.goodhart_mechanism: UCB1 exploit rewards merge_rate * volume (lesson count). Spearman(UCB1, benefit_ratio)=0.60 — moderate correlation; 64% variance unexplained. Soul correction improves rho from 0.10 to 0.60 (large effect), but this means without soul the metric is near-random w.r.t. human benefit. Soul correction is P-356 additive patch on multiplicative Goodhart chain. Volume bias: domains with many dispatches have high lessons and high merge_rate by persistence, not by quality. Mean rank gap 5.3 positions = substantial reordering vs true benefit ranking.
chain_2_ucb1.downstream_amplification: UCB1 high scores -> more dispatches -> more merge opportunities -> higher merge_rate -> higher UCB1 exploit. Volume self-reinforces. Soul correction (<=60% multiplier) cannot break this feedback loop.

chain_3_sharpe.proxy_metric: Sharpe: N (0-12 integer, self-assigned by session agent per lesson)
chain_3_sharpe.target_claimed: lesson quality, information density, citation attractor (P-248)
chain_3_sharpe.target_measurability: PARTIAL — P-248 makes testable prediction (citations); no external quality oracle

findings.rubric_note: No scoring rubric in SWARM.md, TEMPLATE.md, or DISTILL.md. P-298 explicitly flags Sharpe name collision (compact.py citations/age vs lesson header integer).

p248_test.interpretation: P-248 was measured at n=694 (S424). At n=801 (S540), rho=0.154 < threshold 0.3. P-248 not supported at current corpus size. Either the citation attractor effect is small/noisy, or compressed self-rating has eroded the signal since S424.

volume_inflation_test.description: Does domain lesson volume correlate with higher avg Sharpe? (selection pressure test)
volume_inflation_test.interpretation: Not tested (concurrent session interference); structural argument applies: sessions in high-dispatch domains produce more lessons and face more social pressure to rate highly.

chain_3_sharpe.goodhart_mechanism: 78% of lessons self-rate >=8/12. CV=0.168 shows compressed distribution (low discriminating power). No standardized rubric exists. P-248 citation attractor FALSIFIED at N=801 (rho=0.154 < 0.30). Structural incentive: Sharpe feeds UCB1 via sharpe_factor = avg_domain_sharpe/7.7. Higher Sharpe -> higher UCB1 exploit -> more dispatches -> more lesson opportunities. Sessions in high-value domains have structural incentive to self-rate high.
chain_3_sharpe.downstream_amplification: Sharpe inflation -> UCB1 sharpe_factor inflation -> more dispatch -> more lessons -> more self-rated Sharpe -> higher domain avg_sharpe -> higher UCB1. Global normalization by 7.7 provides no protection if global average also inflates. At N=801 lessons the global mean Sharpe is 8.12 vs the normalization constant 7.7.

structural_cascade_links.amplification: Sharpe inflation raises UCB1 exploit term proportionally; global normalization (7.7) is already exceeded by observed mean (8.12)

structural_cascade_links.mechanism: More dispatch -> more lesson writing -> more self-assigned Sharpe opportunities
structural_cascade_links.amplification: High-volume domains accumulate more self-rated lessons, raising domain avg_sharpe over time

structural_cascade_links.mechanism: orient.py: proxy-K drift triggers MAINT_DUE_BOOST_PER_ITEM for meta domain
structural_cascade_links.amplification: proxy-K growth -> meta dispatch priority -> more meta lessons -> meta avg_sharpe up -> meta UCB1 exploit up

structural_cascade_links.mechanism: More dispatches -> more sessions -> more files produced -> bootstrap tier grows -> proxy-K increases
structural_cascade_links.amplification: Dispatch frequency drives proxy-K growth, creating more compaction pressure

compound_cascade.key_structural_finding: P-333 (goodhart-cascade-compound-error): cascade propagates upward through abstraction layers (R2=0.91, 6 layers). P-356 (multiplicative-proxy-correction): additive corrections cannot repair multiplicative Goodhart chains. All three chains have additive corrections: (1) soul boost on UCB1, (2) compaction events on proxy-K, (3) no correction on Sharpe. None replace the proxy-target relationship with an external ground truth.
compound_cascade.falsifiability: PARTIALLY UNFALSIFIABLE. Chain 1 top-level claim untestable (Kolmogorov incomputability). Chains 2 and 3 are testable and show divergence. Interaction terms (how much Chain 3 distortion amplifies Chain 2) would require A/B testing with and without Sharpe feedback — infeasible without external control swarm.
compound_cascade.global_normalization_already_exceeded: Sharpe normalization constant 7.7 < observed mean 8.12 — normalizer is stale

falsification_design: Chain 1 falsified-if: proxy-K shows net decrease over 100+ sessions. Chain 2 falsified-if: Spearman(UCB1, benefit_ratio) > 0.7. Chain 3 falsified-if: Spearman(Sharpe, inbound_cites) > 0.3 AND pct_>=8 < 0.60. Compound cascade falsified-if: no structural cross-dependencies between chains.
prescriptions: Rename proxy-K to bootstrap verbosity metric to accurately represent what it measures.
Add lossless compression ratio of all swarm files as independent MDL estimate.
UCB1 exploit should incorporate benefit_ratio directly, not only via soul multiplier.
P-248 requires re-measurement at current N (rho=0.154 vs claimed positive effect).
Sharpe needs retrospective validation: rank-order lessons by Sharpe, check if citation attractor holds.
Sharpe normalization constant in dispatch_scoring.py (7.7) should auto-update to current global mean (8.12+).
Document the 4 structural cascade feedback loops in SWARM.md to make circularity visible.
